title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Unsupported device shows "Device support coming soon" popup when tapping info icon on device home screen after launch date with empty LM version
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.

2. On the Home screen, connect a newly released Bluetooth audio device that is not yet supported by the app (i.e., the device's Launch Date has passed but the app does not have LM version info for it).
3. On the Home screen, locate the connected device card.
4. Tap the info (i) icon on the device card.
6. Tap outside the popup area to dismiss it.
expected: A popup is displayed with the message: \"Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited.\" The popup can be dismissed by tapping outside of it.
